data.body: MERGED 516 bug#10 (9d7c closed; had to reclaim an 88s stale index.lock first — between my 15s manual threshold and #2's 300s auto-reclaim). 6 bugs fully done: #5 #4 #7 #10 (+#2 code merged, 562f pending 519) + skill. 518(#8) STILL failing CI: yaml import case abstains on default-suite (which HAS pyyaml core dep) but refutes locally -> resolver discrepancy (import-kind not wired to env backend, or backend gated behind [agents]); #8 subagent resumed to root-cause in a minimal 'pip install -e .' venv. Rebased 513(#3) 519(3b4e) onto current main. Remaining changes: 509 513 515 517 518 519. Merged Gerrit: 507 508 510 512 514 516.
